_comment: SLICE_S1_CONTRACT.md §4 — additive manifest file, union-merge friendly. Only entries S1's own pillars consume. S5's ledger row owns seeding the eng-review §5 v0 batch; that manifest lands alongside this one as a sibling file, never edits to this file's rows.
